title: Better Minecraft Trailer
description: A pack trying to recreate the trailer's look and feel, with extra features to enhance the experience.
body:
Welcome to a better Minecraft trailer remake experience.

Featuring Distant Horizons v2 and more optimization mods, as well as all the optimizations from Distantly Optimized, this experience is unmatched.

**Plus, it works right out of the box! Simply create a new world, and enjoy!**
